occupation: Senior Business Development & Sales Lead at MEDIAKEYS
headline: Senior Business Development & Sales Lead at Mediakeys
summary:
I specialise in helping UK-based brands and agencies expand their reach through strategic global advertising. Mediakeys is an independent media agency with 17 offices worldwide, offering international expertise and innovative media solutions tailored to each market.

I’m always looking to collaborate with start-ups, fast-growing brands, and agencies that need a partner to navigate global advertising. If you’re looking to expand your brand’s presence worldwide, let’s connect and explore how Mediakeys can support your growth.
📩 Feel free to reach out to discuss how we can work together.

experiences.title: Senior Business Development & Sales Lead
experiences.description:
- Responsible for building and evolving Mediakeys’ business development and sales function, while supporting and collaborating with global offices.
- Lead the identification of new market opportunities and shape the sales approach and outreach strategy.
- Drive revenue growth by securing and closing new direct brand and agency partnerships.
- Act as the primary commercial contact throughout the new business and pitch process, owning relationships through to deal close before handover to delivery teams.

experiences.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
experiences.description: In this role, I was responsible for creating engaging social media content across Instagram and Facebook while also assisting with customer service. I professionally managed customer complaints, ensuring timely resolutions, and contacted potential contributors and investors to support business growth. Collaborating closely with the CEO and a MaaS Research Fellow, I contributed to brainstorming future project themes. I also manually onboarded customers using a complex system, requiring strong attention to detail. Additionally, I utilised InDesign and Canva for content creation and took on high levels of responsibility across various aspects of the business.

experiences.title: Account Executive
experiences.description:
- Supported the planning and execution of national and local media campaigns across multiple industries, spanning both B2B and B2C clients
- Managed ad serving, campaign delivery, and ongoing performance monitoring to ensure smooth execution
- Contributed to media planning across a high volume of campaigns with varying budgets and objectives
- Owned campaign monitoring and query resolution, ensuring timely follow-ups and issue management
- Built strong working relationships with clients, media owners, and internal planning teams
- Analysed campaign performance and delivered clear End of Campaign reports and presentations

Clients: Super Retail Group (Supercheap Auto & Rebel Sports), Philips (Personal Health & Health Systems), Leukaemia Foundation, The Field Jobs, Brisbane Grammar School, and Queensland Airports

experiences.company: Queensland Academy for Science Mathematics and Technology (SMT)
experiences.title: Sports Coach

education.degree_name: Bachelor of Business Management and Communications

education.field_of_study: International GCSE’s and International Baccalaureate Diploma

accomplishment_courses.name: Writing and Editing for the Professions

volunteer_work.title: Fundraising Volunteer - Do It In A Dress
volunteer_work.description: For the month of October I did 'Doing It In A Dress' because over 130 million girls around the world are denied an education. Without an education a girl can remain stuck in the cycle of poverty, and struggle to earn an income or look after herself and her family. I think it is incredibly important for everyone to receive the education they deserve.
